rulings.Case Title: TIM CHOI SUN et al VS. ELAINE TAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce Settlement; Declaration Of Christina Y. Chen; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFS TIM SUN and MARY SUN's Motion To Enforce Settlement; Declaration Of Christina Y. Chen; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities continued to October 29, 2015 for moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 no later than October 16, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MICHAEL SHUEY VS. KARIN L ANDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF GEORGE SHUEY's Motion For Preliminary Injunction continued to October 21, 2015 per October 7, 2015 ex-parte order. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CLAIRE HACKETT VS. CYRIL A. HACKETT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Records Subpoena To First Republic Bank And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT CYRIL HACKETT's Motion To Quash Records Subpoena To First Republic Bank And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained. Demurrer to cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing is sustained with leave to amend each element of this cause of action. Demurrer to fraud cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege each element of this cause of action with requisite particularity. Demurer to cause of action for interference with contractual relations, interference with prospective business advantage and conversion is sustained without leave to amend. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED is Denied as to paragraphs 15-21, Exhibits C-K. Motion is granted as to the request for attorney's fees. Motion is otherwise moot in light of the ruling on demurrer. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. CARLOS NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of First Amended Summons And First Amended Complaint (Delta Motion)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 9, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT CARLOS NAVARRO's Motion To Quash Service Of First Amended Summons And First Amended Complaint (Delta Motion) DENIED. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for commercial unlawful detainer. = (501/AJR)
